messages.welcome: Welcome to the Smart Plant Care System Bot.
messages.help:
Available commands:
/start - Start the bot
/help - Show help
/devices - Show registered devices from alert generator
/status <device_id> - Show latest sensor values for one device
/alerts - Show recent alerts
/report <device_id> - Generate a report for one device
/commands - Show control command history
messages.device_id_required: Please provide a device_id. Example: /status raspi-01
messages.report_device_id_required: Please provide a device_id. Example: /report raspi-01
messages.unauthorized_user: You are not authorized to use this bot.
